title: Why Cruise Line Stocks Dropped Today
text: The conflict in Eastern Europe is hurting cruise line stocks today.

title: Key Words: Norwegian Cruise sees omicron as ‘last major surge' as COVID-19 transitions to an endemic
text: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Ltd. reported fourth-quarter results that missed Wall Street's expectations Thursday, but Chief Executive Frank Del Rio remained upbeat on the outlook for the cruise industry, as he indicated the company can start operating with the belief that the worst of the COVID-19 crisis has passed.

title: Norwegian Cruise cancels sailings to Russia, Ukraine ports
text: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Ltd said on Thursday Russia's invasion of Ukraine has forced it to alter itineraries and cancel sailings to ports in the countries.

title: Norwegian Cruise Line Stock Dips On Q4 Miss, Q1 Loss Warning
text: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Ltd (NYSE: NCLH) reported fourth-quarter FY21 revenue of $487.4 million, missing the consensus of $571.85 million. Revenue increased from $9.6 million in Q4 2020 as cruise voyages continued to resume in the quarter.

title: Earnings Previews: Alibaba, Discovery, Newmont, Nikola, Norwegian Cruise Lines
text: Markets were closed Monday in observance of Presidents Day. Even so, a couple of intrepid energy companies chose to report results when no one was around to hear them.

title: Norwegian Cruise (NCLH) to Post Q4 Earnings: What's in Store?
text: Norwegian Cruise's (NCLH) fourth-quarter top line is likely to reflect increased revenue generation from onboard spending and passenger tickets.

title: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings to Hold Conference Call on Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2021 Financial Results
text: MIAMI, Feb. 15, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Ltd. (NYSE:NCLH) (together with NCL Corporation Ltd., “Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings” or the “Company”) announced today it will report fourth quarter and full year 2021 financial results on Thursday, February 24, 2022 at 7:00 a.m. Eastern Time with a conference call to discuss results at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time. The conference call will be simultaneously webcast via the Company's Investor Relations website, https://www.nclhltd.com/investors . A replay of the webcast will be available at the same site for 30 days following the call.

title: Why Royal Caribbean, Carnival, and Norwegian Cruise Stocks Popped Today
text: Détente between Russia and Ukraine removes one threat from the cruise business.

title: Truist's Patrick Scholes explains why he's dovish on the cruise stocks
text: Carnival, Norwegian, and Royal Caribbean stocks have recovered roughly 20% each since last week, but Truist Securities' Patrick Scholes continues to see them as “not” a smart pick for 2022. Scholes defends his dovish stance on CNBC's ‘Squawk on the Street' Scholes warns that the cruise companies are still facing “structural issues” that are likely […] The post Truist's Patrick Scholes explains why he's dovish on the cruise stocks appeared first on Invezz.

title: Why Norwegian Cruise Stock Just Dropped
text: Norwegian is rolling over -- not paying off -- a lot of debt.

title: Norwegian Cruise stock drops after downbeat full-year outlook
text: Shares of Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Ltd. NCLH, -4.05% dropped 4.0% in morning trading Thursday, after the cruise operator said it has yet to complete its fourth-quarter financial information, but also provided a downbeat full-year revenue outlook.

title: Norwegian Cruise Line dropping mask requirement for March sailings
text: "Our cruises will operate with 100% vaccination of crew and guests age five and over, therefore face coverings are not required while onboard," a notice on the company's website reads.

title: Why Cruise Stocks Rose Today
text: Mask requirements on cruise lines will soon be no more.

title: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Ltd. (NCLH) Stock: Why The Price Increased
text: The stock price of Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Ltd. (NYSE: NCLH) increased by 3.64% in the most recent trading session.

title: Norwegian Cruise Line Sees an Adjusted Profit in the Second Half
text: The cruise operator said Omicron-related hit seems to be on the fade with 'continued strong demand for sailings in the medium and longer term.'

title: Norwegian Cruise stock jumps after bookings, expectations for profitability update
text: Shares of Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Ltd. NCLH, +8.40% jumped 2.7% in premarket trading, after the cruise operator affirmed it outlook to be profitable in the second half of 2022, but pushed back its timing to be cash flow positive as the omicron variant hurt bookings.

title: Why Royal Caribbean, Carnival, and Norwegian Cruise Bounced Today
text: One analyst shook his head at last week's sell-off -- and said Royal Caribbean is still a buy.

title: Cruise stock surge toward the top of the S&P 500's gainers list
text: Cruise stocks surged Monday, and were among the biggest gainers in the S&P 500 SPX, -0.13% , in the wake of Royal Caribbean Group's RCL, +6.97% earnings report in which the cruise operator Chief Executive Jason Liberty said "we are past COVID."
